executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Focus on basic stability checks as requested by the user: Auth (valid/invalid credentials, signup flow, password visibility), Marketplace (listings load, own listings hidden, unavailable hidden, search), Create Listing (valid/invalid input, success, appears in marketplace), Trade Flow (initiate, not own, not unavailable, status update), Messaging (send, receive, UI update), Notifications (new message, trade update), Review System (submit, no self-review), Routing (nav works, no full refresh breaking).
